description.value:
You successfully performed a ritual to bond with the spirit of the planet Akiton. While this connection has faded with time, you retain a fraction of the planet's power. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Additional Lore] general feat for Akiton Lore (or the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Assurance] general feat for Akiton Lore, if you already have Additional Lore for Akiton Lore). Choose one common cantrip from the primal spell list.

You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Detect Magic] and the chosen cantrip as primal innate spells at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level, rounded up.

publication.title: Starfinder Society Scenario #1-15: Ruins of the World Soul
